race.comment: LEGIO TEN (1) is flying and looks well placed again having won his past two, far too good from midfield in a handy BM66 at Pakenham when last seen. Up slightly in grade again now but finds another nice race and can get the job done. Not sure what to do with THEBELMONTGANGSTER (11) who has been awful in both runs this time in. Too dry first up, too wet second up? Maybe he gets it just right today but take on trust. NEARING LIBERTY (4) resumes with some handy figures that say he can measure up fresh. PREVAILED (9) is some query at 1400m but will be up on speed.
